GM:(0,0,0)  R:(-1/2,0,1/2)  S:(0,-1/2,1/2)  T:(-1/2,1/2,-1)  TA:(1/2,1/2,1)  W:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1,1,1)  WA:(1/2,-1/2,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  V:(1/2,1/2,0)  M:(0,1,1/2)  A:(0,0,1/2)  U:(0,1/2,1/2)  Y:(0,1,0)  UA:(0,-1/2,-1/2)
GM1  GM2  GM4  GM3  (R)L1L1  (R)L2L2  (S)V1V1  (S)V2V2  (T)M1  (T)M2  (T)M4  (T)M3  (TA)A1  (TA)A2  (TA)A4  (TA)A3  (W)U1U1  (W)U2U2  (W)U4U4  (W)U3U3  (X)Y1  (X)Y2  (X)Y4  (X)Y3  (WA)UA1UA1  (WA)UA2UA2  (WA)UA3UA3  (WA)UA4UA4
